CustomField.description:
Code that identifies the basis of the value in the List Price field. 3 represents Standard Cost, 5 represents Standard List Price.
0 % of New Base Price 1 % of Base Price 2 % of Current Net Price 3 % of Cost 4 Cost Plus Amount 5 Add on Amount 6 Add on Variable Amount 7 Add on Formula Amount 8 Add on User Program Amount 9 Gross Profit Margin
CustomField.label: Basis Code
